name: Virtua Fighter 5 R.E.V.O. World Stage
short_description: The pioneer 3D fighting series continues to evolve as Virtua Fighter 5 R.E.V.O. World Stage arrives on Steam! Featuring: Crossplay and Rollback Netcode support, a brand new single player mode: "World Stage", and more!
detailed_description:
Virtua Fighter 5 R.E.V.O. World Stage 30th Anniversary Edition

Virtua Fighter 5 R.E.V.O. World Stage arrives on Steam! Celebrate the 30th anniversary of the first 3D fighting series with this special edition packed with exclusive content.

includes:

-Virtua Fighter 5 R.E.V.O. World Stage game

-VF 30th Anniversary Swimsuit Costume Set

-VF 30th Anniversary Soundtrack Collection

-VF 30th Anniversary Pre-Production Artwork

- Virtua Fighter Legendary Pack DLC

- “Yakuza” Series Collaboration Pack DLC

-30th Anniversary Edition Ranking Titles

-30th Anniversary Wallpaper Set

Virtua Fighter 5 R.E.V.O. World Stage continues to evolve to new heights with new features including:

-Rollback Netcode and Cross-play support let you take on any challenger, anywhere, across the globe in the most intense battles yet.

-A brand-new single-player mode, "World Stage": Challenge powerful rivals on a solo quest to become the ultimate fighter

-Enhanced replay functionality and improved training tools.


About the Game

The pioneer 3D fighting series continues to evolve as Virtua Fighter 5 R.E.V.O. World Stage arrives on Steam!

Virtua Fighter 5 R.E.V.O. World Stage takes the gameplay of Virtua Fighter 5 to new heights:

-Rollback Netcode and Cross-play support let you take on any challenger, anywhere, across the globe in the most intense battles yet.

-A brand-new single-player mode, "World Stage": Challenge powerful rivals on a solo quest to become the ultimate fighter

-Enhanced replay functionality and improved training tools.

Note: This product contains only the base game. A bundle including the base game and additional content is also available. Please take care to avoid duplicate purchases.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese*, Korean, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Arabic, Hindi
*languages with full audio support
